productDisplayName: Fila Men Pack of 3 White Socks
description: Specially engineered to offer maximum performance and exemplary comfort, these socks from fila make for a great buy for those who never compromise on style and luxury. With a cushioned heel, terry base and soft seam, there's no better way to revel in the comfort of footwear than with this pack that contains three pairs of socks in white.Made of soft cotton fibre blend fabric for a snug and secure Fit, durability and stretchable comfortEngineered with an Air Channel system to keep the feet dry and comfortableTerry base footbed with power cushioning to absorb shock and impact, offering non-stop comfortCushioned heel for impact protectionComfort grip at the mouth to ensure a soft grip around the ankleSoft seam at the toe region for abrasion-free and enhanced comfortBrand name printed on the mouthSock careMachine wash in warm water using a mild detergentUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low in a delicate cycleDo not iron
